name: vnet-dedicated
description: Dedicated VNet template for Infra dynamic provisioning: same network policy as vnet-default (2 subnets, multi-zone, auto CIDR) but isolates the network per Infra (named '{infraId}-{connection}') instead of sharing across Infras. Use when network isolation between Infras is required. Note: dedicated VNets consume the limited per-region VPC quota faster; prefer vnet-default (shared) unless isolation is needed. Dedicated VNets are reclaimed by the unused-resource release operation once no VMs reference them.
